overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving along a deserted industrial highway lined with solar arrays at dusk. The camera approaches a large digital billboard, executes U-turns, and views the structure from multiple angles while flying vehicles pass overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted industrial highway flanked by solar panel arrays

events.description: flying vehicle enters the sky and hovers above the road ahead

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the empty highway toward the large digital billboard in the distance

entered.detail: rows of solar panels extending along the left side of the highway
rows of solar panels extending along the right side of the highway
large rectangular structure with glowing red digital display facing the camera
tall industrial towers with smoke stacks visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, empty industrial highway at dusk, flanked by extensive solar panel arrays on both sides. The vehicle drives steadily toward a massive digital billboard displaying red symbols, while a flying vehicle hovers overhead against the purple twilight sky.

events.description: vehicle initiates sharp right turn to begin 180-degree direction reversal
completing the U-turn, now facing the opposite direction on the highway

agents.ego_description: executing a wide U-turn on the deserted highway, swinging the vehicle around to face the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a smooth U-turn on the wide highway, temporarily losing sight of the digital billboard as it swings around. The solar arrays swap sides in the frame as the camera completes the 180-degree rotation to face the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching digital billboard from reverse direction

events.description: now viewing the reverse side of the digital billboard displaying TECHNICA signage
passing the billboard structure which temporarily blocks the forward view

agents.ego_description: driving toward the billboard from the opposite direction, approaching the structure's rear face

entered.detail: structure displaying TECHNICA in illuminated green letters on the reverse side

segments.scene_description: Now traveling in the opposite direction, the vehicle approaches the digital billboard from behind, revealing the TECHNICA signage on its reverse face. The industrial complex is now visible on the left as the vehicle drives past the billboard structure.

events.description: executing second U-turn to reverse direction and face the original way
viewing the front of the digital billboard with red display once again

agents.ego_description: completing the turn and accelerating back toward the billboard from the original direction

entered.detail: structure with large red digital display facing the camera

segments.scene_description: After passing the billboard, the vehicle quickly turns around again and drives back toward the original approach direction. The solar arrays return to their original left-right configuration as the vehicle once again faces the red digital display of the billboard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a deserted industrial highway at dusk that circles a massive digital billboard to reveal its different faces. It begins with a steady drive toward a billboard displaying red symbols, flanked by extensive solar panel arrays under a purple twilight sky as a flying vehicle hovers overhead. As the vehicle executes a smooth U-turn, the solar arrays swap sides in the frame and the billboard temporarily disappears from view. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the structure from behind, revealing the TECHNICA signage on its reverse face and an industrial complex to the left. Finally, the vehicle turns around once more, returning to its original heading as the solar arrays realign and the red digital display comes back into focus.
